film.title: The Luck of the Irish
film.overview: A teenager must battle for a gold charm to keep his family from being controlled by an evil leprechaun.

dialogues.dialogue: and still can't stew oatmeal without burning it.  Come along, boys!  And we'll shame him with what he's done.  Uh... Uhh!  Uhh!
¶  [ CELTIC MUSIC PLAYING ] ¶  [ CROWD CHEERING ]  Luck's got nothing to do with it.  I'm proud of you, son.  Hooray!  Yeah!  Bonnie.
